items.title: Indian university faces backlash for presenting Chinese robot as its own
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: 'Difficult' Russia-Ukraine peace talks end without breakthrough
items.dek: The second day of negotiations between Ukraine and Russia ended after just two hours.
items.body: The second day of negotiations between Ukraine and Russia ended after just two hours.

items.title: Indian university faces backlash for claiming Chinese robodog as own at AI summit
items.dek: A professor claimed that a robotic dog made by Chinese firm Unitree had been made by the university.
items.body: A professor claimed that a robotic dog made by Chinese firm Unitree had been made by the university.
items.author: IriLine Desk
